## Research Ideation & Experiment Planning

### [`experiment-planner`](../skills/experiment-planner)

Plan deep-learning and computer-science research ideas as claim-driven, pilot-first experiment matrices.

- Tags: `research`, `experiments`, `deep-learning`, `planning`
- Requirements: none beyond the tools needed for the task
- Provenance: `adapter`
- Source: [source map](../skills/experiment-planner/references/source-map.md)
- License: `MIT`; see [notice](../NOTICE.md)

```text
$experiment-planner Turn this collaborative perception idea into the smallest viable validation experiment.
```

### [`grill-me`](../skills/grill-me)

Interview a user one decision at a time to stress-test an underspecified plan or design.

- Tags: `planning`, `interview`, `decision-making`, `requirements`
- Requirements: none beyond the tools needed for the task
- Provenance: `third-party-exact`
- Source: [pinned source `62f43a18177b`](https://github.com/mattpocock/skills/blob/62f43a18177be6ec82da242e59ffbc490a4c22ea/skills/productivity/grill-me/SKILL.md)
- License: `MIT`; see [notice](../NOTICE.md)

```text
$grill-me Stress-test this experiment plan before implementation begins.
```

## Evidence & Search

### [`research-evidence`](../skills/research-evidence)

Search academic evidence, verify citation metadata, and check whether sources support research claims.

- Tags: `research`, `literature-search`, `citations`, `evidence`
- Requirements: Network access for literature lookup; Optional paper-search MCP or RefChecker backends
- Provenance: `original`
- Source: original project work
- License: `MIT`; see [notice](../NOTICE.md)

```text
$research-evidence Check whether this related-work claim is supported by CVPR, ICCV, or ECCV papers.
```

### [`search-first`](../skills/search-first)

Search for maintained tools, libraries, skills, research, and proven patterns before building a custom solution.

- Tags: `search`, `libraries`, `reuse`, `research`
- Requirements: Network or repository search access


## Review & Rebuttal

### [`paper-review-panel`](../skills/paper-review-panel)

Run a top-conference-style paper review panel and synthesize readiness risks without editing the manuscript.

- Requirements: none beyond the tools needed for the task
- Provenance: `original`
- Source: original project work
- License: `MIT`; see [notice](../NOTICE.md)

```text
$paper-review-panel Review this draft as a CVPR-style panel and identify the highest acceptance risks.
```

### [`rebuttal-response-skills`](../skills/rebuttal-response-skills)

Draft, revise, compress, and stress-test concise author responses grounded only in verified evidence.

- Tags: `rebuttal`, `author-response`, `reviewers`, `academic-writing`

